title: 4 Service Stocks Poised to Beat Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Here we pick four business service stocks, namely, Avis Budget Group, Inc. (CAR), Verisk Analytics, Inc. (VRSK), Gartner, Inc. (IT) and Aptiv PLC (APTV), which are likely to pull off earnings surprise this season.

title: With Tesla Faltering, What's The Outlook For Electric Vehicle Suppliers?
text: Our theme of EV Supplier stocks had a relatively tough 2022, declining by about 21%, compared to the S&P 500 which fell by about 19% over the year.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Hold Aptiv (APTV) Stock Now
text: Connected cars market as well as solid liquidity boost Aptiv (APTV).

title: Aptiv to Release Fourth Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: DUBLIN , Jan. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), will release its fourth quarter 2022 financial results on February 2, and will hold an investor call the same day at 8:00 a.m. EST. The call will be hosted by Aptiv's Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Kevin Clark, and Chief Financial Officer and Senior Vice President, Business Operations, Joseph Massaro.
